title: The AI Outbound Stack
author: Unknown (Notion — meadow-leader-47c)
steals: Method 2: LinkedIn Comment Scraping — highest intent, lowest competition method. Scrape commenters from 3-5 creator posts about problems you solve.
48-72 hour window: Post comment sections die fast. Reach out while the conversation is fresh.
Creator post commenters are publicly raising their hand — they care about the problem right now.
Personalization is trivial: reference the creator, the post topic, and one line showing you read their comment.
Tool stack for Method 2: Triggery for monitoring → Clay for enrichment → email/sequencer
BuiltWith + Clay: Find companies using complementary tools but NOT your solution (Uses/Does NOT use filter)
Funding + Hiring combo: Crunchbase funding alerts + LinkedIn jobs cross-reference = double intent signal
Website visitor ID: 'I noticed you were on our site' feels honest. Pretending you found them randomly feels dishonest.
15 templates across 7 methods. Quick reference matrix compares Intent Level, Volume, and Tool Stack per method.
For Nebula: Method 2 (creator posts) is the fastest win — existing Apify pipeline just needs new input URLs.
nebula_adaptation: Added CREATOR_POSTS config to linkedin_post_monitor.py with get_source_type() for creator-sourced leads (+2 score boost). New comment-based outreach template in linkedin_reply_templates.json (creator_comment_outreach). New cold email framework: linkedin_comment_outreach. New DM template: dm_creator_template. Quick reference guide: growth_system/ai_outbound_stack_reference.md. 48-72 hour window already satisfied by every-2h monitor.
